run_summary.summary: Caught two things from Mariah's Friday status table that the last run missed. First: Aleve content is under brand review — all 3 IG Reels for @Aleve_US are submitted for approval as of yesterday, so I moved that card to Approval. Second: JLab March payment is overdue since 4/20 — the brand had the wrong email for Liz's registration form, Mariah corrected it, and payment is supposedly on its way. Worth confirming that's actually landed. Bonus flag: Bark content was due 4/24 (yesterday) and there's no delivery confirmation in the emails — make sure that got submitted.

suggestions.message: Bark content was due 4/24 (yesterday) — no confirmation of delivery in the emails. Did the TikTok + whitelisting assets go out? If not, get them in ASAP.

JLab March payment was due 4/20 — Mariah flagged the brand had Liz's email wrong for the registration form. That's been corrected, but confirm the payment has actually arrived before following up with JLab.
JLab May campaign is 'ready for content' per Mariah — make sure that card is in the Content stage if it isn't already. Deliverable due 5/17/26.

deals.next_action: Check in on content approval with Aleve
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Mariah's status update confirms all 3x IG Reels for @Aleve_US are under content approval. $12,000 deal.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Aleve content (3x IG Reels @Aleve_US) submitted for brand approval per Mariah's status update — moved to Approval

deals.next_action: Confirm JLab March registration form + payment received (was due 4/20)
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: JLab March Campaign — brand had wrong email on file for Liz's registration form. Mariah corrected it; form + payment now expected soon. Payment was originally due 4/20/26.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: JLab March — brand had wrong email for registration form, now corrected per Mariah. Payment overdue since 4/20, expected to arrive soon.
